markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review CheckThat's strategy and product direction based on new findings.](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Pivot:** The product will pivot from a self-serve tool to a high-value reporting service. This shift is validated by a successful manual analysis for client Eon, which revealed actionable insights (e.g., 80% of citations are listicles) that the current UI cannot provide.](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
  - [**Funnel Performance:** The current self-serve funnel has high sign-up volume (\~200/week) but near-zero activation. This validates the pivot, as the lack of paying users simplifies the transition away from the current UI.](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [**Technical Blocker:** The current Postgres database cannot support the complex, on-the-fly data analysis required for the new reporting strategy. The team will prototype a TimescaleDB migration while awaiting ClickHouse learnings from the OS project.](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
  - [**Immediate Priorities:** The engineering team will focus on automating data management (e.g., brand approval) and reducing infrastructure costs. All other feature development is paused.](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)

## Topics

### CheckThat Funnel Performance

  - [**Sign-ups:** \~200/week, a steady volume.](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [**Activation:** Near-zero.](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
      - [1 user invited someone to a workspace.](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
      - [1 user managed prompts in bulk.](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [**Public Pages:** High traffic, confirming strong interest in the content.](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [**Implication:** The lack of paying users is a strategic benefit, as it avoids the need to support a legacy UI during the product pivot.](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)

### Technical & Engineering Status

  - [**Headcount:** Reduced engineering focus due to Pedro's absence and Jose's work on the database migration.](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
  - [**Database Migration:** The current Postgres setup cannot handle the required analytical queries.](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
      - [**Plan:** Jose will prototype a TimescaleDB migration (an easy switch from Postgres) while awaiting ClickHouse learnings from the OS project.](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
      - [**Rationale:** ClickHouse is the long-term goal for both CheckThat and the OS, but the OS team's implementation will serve as the primary learning vehicle.](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
      - [**Impact:** This migration is a hard blocker for implementing advanced filtering in the Overview dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)

### New Product Strategy: High-Value Reporting

  - [**Validation:** A manual analysis for client Eon confirmed the value of a reporting-first approach.](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
      - [**Method:** An agent analyzed data exported from CheckThat, augmented with SEMrush data, to generate a comprehensive report.](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
      - [**Key Findings:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=2112.0)
          - [**Source Breakdown:** 49% of citations are from analysts or direct competitors, indicating a highly established market.](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=2112.0)
          - [**Content Type:** 80% of citations are from "best of" or listicle content, revealing a clear content strategy opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=2271.0)
  - [**Product Vision:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=2418.0)
      - [**Core Output:** A prescriptive report, not a self-serve dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=2332.0)
      - [**UI Revamp:** The UI will be redesigned to prioritize these high-level reports, with raw data moved to a secondary view.](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=2588.0)
      - [**Monetization:** The report format was validated by 5 people at a recent dinner who offered to pay $100 for it.](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=2418.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=2455.0)
      - [**Public Reports:** Publish monthly reports on AI visibility trends using CheckThat's proprietary data.](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=2455.0)
      - [**Benefit:** Establishes thought leadership and serves as a case study for how clients can use the platform.](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=2472.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Marcel:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=3081.0)
      - [Distill the Eon analysis into a formal report for Daniel by Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=3081.0)
      - [Provide Stevie with prescriptive engineering directions by Monday, focusing on data management automation and cost reduction.](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=3081.0)
      - [Schedule a recorded session with Mario to get technical validation on the new report format.](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=2663.0)
  - [**Stevie:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=3101.0)
      - [Direct the engineering team to pause all feature development and focus on data management automation and cost reduction.](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=3101.0)
      - [Review the product handbook to understand the methodology behind the new reporting strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=1477.0)
  - [**Daniel:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=2384.0)
      - [Review the Eon analysis report to identify overlaps with the OS project's metric collection.](https://fathom.video/share/Xar5k5EvFqi--ihreH8TYKzk43vfeoYs?tab=summary&timestamp=2384.0)
